log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Halfling — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:11+3=14 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:17+-2=15 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:5+-2=3 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 3/3 targets affected.
Frost Giant is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Ogre is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Ogre is incapacitated — skipping turn.
=== ROUND 2 ===
--- Halfling — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Ogre.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:14+-2=12 vs DC 16] FAIL! 7 psychic damage. HP: 52/59
→ ⚠ Ogre: Charm broken by damage! No longer incapacitated.
Frost Giant is incapacitated — skipping turn.
--- Ogre's turn ---
Ogre attacks Halfling — Bardic Musician with Greatclub: [d20:19+6=25 vs AC 14] HIT! 19 damage. Halfling — Bardic Musician HP: 48/67
→ Halfling — Bardic Musician loses concentration on Hypnotic Pattern! [CON save 5 vs DC 10]
--- Ogre's turn ---
Ogre can't reach Halfling — Bardic Musician with Greatclub (distance 10ft, range 5ft).
=== ROUND 3 ===
--- Halfling — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 1 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:17+-2=15 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:2+-2=0 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 2/2 targets affected.
--- Frost Giant's turn ---
Frost Giant attacks Halfling — Bardic Musician with Greataxe: [d20:3+9=12 vs AC 14] MISS.
Frost Giant attacks Halfling — Bardic Musician with Greataxe: [d20:15+9=24 vs AC 14] HIT! 18 damage. Halfling — Bardic Musician HP: 30/67
→ Halfling — Bardic Musician loses concentration on Hypnotic Pattern! [CON save 9 vs DC 10]
--- Ogre's turn ---
Ogre attacks Halfling — Bardic Musician with Greatclub: [d20:3+6=9 vs AC 14] MISS.
--- Ogre's turn ---
Ogre attacks Halfling — Bardic Musician with Greatclub: [d20:18+6=24 vs AC 14] HIT! 13 damage. Halfling — Bardic Musician HP: 17/67
=== ROUND 4 ===
--- Halfling — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 0 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:13+3=16 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:11+-2=9 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:5+-2=3 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 2/3 targets affected.
--- Frost Giant's turn ---
Frost Giant attacks Halfling — Bardic Musician with Greataxe: [d20:15+9=24 vs AC 14] HIT! 21 damage. Halfling — Bardic Musician HP: 0/67
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 4 rounds ===

=== ROUND 3 ===
--- Halfling — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Frost Giant.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:11+3=14 vs DC 16] FAIL!
--- Ogre's turn ---
Ogre can't reach Halfling — Bardic Musician with Greatclub (distance 10ft, range 5ft).
Frost Giant is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Frost Giant WIS save vs Hold Person: [d20:2+3=5 vs DC 16] FAIL — still paralyzed.
--- Ogre's turn ---
Ogre attacks Halfling — Bardic Musician with Greatclub: [d20:7+6=13 vs AC 14] MISS.
=== ROUND 4 ===
--- Halfling — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Ogre.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:20+-2=18 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Ogre's turn ---
Ogre attacks Halfling — Bardic Musician with Greatclub: [d20:11+6=17 vs AC 14] HIT! 14 damage. Halfling — Bardic Musician HP: 28/67
Frost Giant is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Frost Giant WIS save vs Hold Person: [d20:15+3=18 vs DC 16] SUCCESS — no longer paralyzed.
--- Ogre's turn ---
Ogre attacks Halfling — Bardic Musician with Greatclub: [d20:8+6=14 vs AC 14] HIT! 12 damage. Halfling — Bardic Musician HP: 16/67
=== ROUND 5 ===
--- Halfling — Bardic Musician's turn ---
→ Dropping concentration on Hold Person
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Halfling — Bardic Musician is affected by Greater Invisibility.
ACTION: Cast Healing Word (Level 1 slot) on Halfling — Bardic Musician.
→ Halfling — Bardic Musician healed for 8 HP. HP: 24/67
--- Ogre's turn ---
Ogre attacks Halfling — Bardic Musician with Greatclub: [d20:6+6=12 vs AC 14] MISS.
--- Frost Giant's turn ---
Frost Giant attacks Halfling — Bardic Musician with Greataxe: [d20:6+9=15 vs AC 14] HIT! 19 damage. Halfling — Bardic Musician HP: 5/67
Frost Giant attacks Halfling — Bardic Musician with Greataxe: [d20:7+9=16 vs AC 14] HIT! 35 damage. Halfling — Bardic Musician HP: 0/67
→ Halfling — Bardic Musician loses concentration on Greater Invisibility! [CON save 13 vs DC 17]
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 5 rounds ===
